task_completion.description: Verify the correct dataset is used and the canvas is renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' in the Data Elements panel on the left. Check the canvas tab at the bottom of the workspace to ensure it is named 'Loyalty Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Tag Cloud visualization is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visualization displaying words in varying sizes (Tag Cloud). The title of this visualization should explicitly read 'VIP Customers (Top 50)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tag Cloud maps Customer Name, Profit, and Customer Segment correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Grammar panel (usually next to the visualization). 'Customer Name' should be in the Category/Words slot, 'Profit' should be in the Size slot, and 'Customer Segment' should be in the Color slot.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization is restricted to the Top 50 customers by Profit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the filter bar above the visualization or in the filter panel. There should be a filter applied to 'Customer Name' or 'Profit' explicitly showing a 'Top 50' condition based on Profit.

task_completion.description: Verify a dashboard filter for Order Date (Year) is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a filter control element placed on the dashboard canvas (usually at the top) that allows filtering by 'Order Date' or 'Year'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop application or a save dialog box. It should display 'Customer_Loyalty_Cloud'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with panels, menus, and canvases being actively used, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the visualization is genuinely rendered from data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tag Cloud should display actual customer names from the dataset in varying sizes and colors, rather than an empty placeholder or a static pasted image.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad) open with the task requirements or expected answers typed out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected workbook name: 'Customer_Loyalty_Cloud' (saved as .dva). Canvas name must be 'Loyalty Analysis'. Visualization must be a Tag Cloud titled 'VIP Customers (Top 50)'. Data mappings: Words = 'Customer Name', Size = 'Profit', Color = 'Customer Segment'. Filters: Top 50 by Profit on the visualization, and 'Order Date' (Year) as a dashboard filter.
